reviews.comment:
La habitación no tenía agua caliente cuando llegamos. Recién al otro día salía agua normalmente. El aire acondicionado funcionaba pero no tiraba aire frío y no se podía regular xq estaba desarmado

(Translated by Google)
The room had no hot water when we arrived. It only started working normally the next day. The air conditioning was on, but it wasn't blowing cold air and couldn't be adjusted because it was disassembled.
